event: Night Scene with Fantastical Creatures over a City
description: A nighttime scene over city rooftops showing fantastical dark creatures — cat-like and demonic forms — flying across a starry blue sky. One creature appears to breathe fire. A tall spire rises in the center. The rooftops below glow with warm orange light. A comet or shooting star streaks across the upper sky. The overall atmosphere is whimsical and theatrical, rendered in dark blues, blacks, and warm accents.

_meta.title: Night at the fairground. Fragment. A sketch for the curtain
